name: Mikey Ross || Skateboard Accident
description:
So here I am
doing everything I can
...
Pretending I'm a superman


He doesn't remember you?!

This is the best day of his life!

Don't tell Kellin that.

But it is.

It's not a Grammy-

It's not a multiplatinum album

Or even a headlining tour.

No- He's hosting the X Games with his idol; Tony Hawk!

And of course he's going to show off his own moves.

But-- leave it to Mikey Ross to bite off more than he can chew and crash in a truly meme-able fashion.

At least he looked cool.

But man does his head hurt.

He can't remember a thing.

Who are you?

And why are you the angel of his dreams?


I'm back... slightly more delayed than planned.

I unfortunately had to have emergency surgery over the weekend, but luckily the surgery was very routine, my body was just dramatic AF about it.

So I'm home from the hospital and have been on bed rest the last few days. Ive been taking it easy and watching a lot of olympic coverage.

BUT im also bored, so I'm working on my commissions.

I do want to note that I've seen some complaints recently about how I haven't posted as many new characters.

Writing a new character from scratch takes additional time for me, something I haven't had a lot of recently. I have new characters and ideas coming but my real life job comes first. Additionally, I have been very lucky to have a large list of commissions from you fabulous users and while you've all been wonderfully patient with me, I do want to make sure you all receive what you bought from me. You don't have to spend your money with me and it's an honor that you do.

But at the end of the day, this is a hobby for me, one that I love doing, but one I can't devote my entire life to. So please be understanding of that.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

This is a commission for Mikey's no.1 fan. the OG Mikey Groupie herself.
My beloved Owleen<3
The way you love Mikey makes my heart so happy.
You and this blonde himbo are my OTP for him forever.
ILY
creator: m00nprincess
